Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for (petitioners) Philip and Augustine Leung and Vivian Lerche who is present in court. Mia Shirley (via Court Call) for (beneficiary) Gregory Leung.

The Court stated that the only issue is that the number of shares for the spin offs is not indicated and that some assets show zero shares. Mr. Freedman agreed to submit a new proposed order reflecting the number of shares. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets and Transferring Assets Into the Trust was taken under submission.

Petition For Conversion Of Trust Assets, Accounting, Recovery Of Trust Assets, Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Continued To Nov-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Vivian Leung. Edward Koplowitz for (co-trustees) Philip & Augustine Leung. Stephanie Hess (via court call) for Gregory Leung.

The Court asked if a settlement has been reached. Mr. Koplowitz reported almost, that they had mediation before Judge Gallagher, that there is a draft circulating, that there are only 1-2 issues to resolve, that a 30 day continuance is requested and that they have a trial date in December. Mr. Freedman stated that they expect the details to get ironed out, that the issues are fairly minor and that they should have a signed settlement agreement soon. Ms. Hess stated that she is in agreement with counsel. Mr. Koplowitz stated that they will notify the court if they settle the matter. Mr. Freedman stated that he would like counsel to stipulate that the trial date can be continued if necessary. The petition for conversion of trust assets, etc., and the petition for instructions were continued to November 2, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chien. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Continued To Nov-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Conversion Of Trust Assets, Accounting, Recovery Of Trust Assets, Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Continued To Sep-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Continued To Sep-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Continued To Sep-14-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Conversion Of Trust Assets, Accounting, Recovery Of Trust Assets, Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Continued To Sep-14-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Vivian Leung. Edward Koplowitz and Gerard Launay for (trustees) Augustine & Philip Leung. Stephanie Hess for and with (beneficiary) Gregory Leung.

Mr. Launay reported that they are close to settlement ($20,000.00 apart), that they suggest a short meeting with the mediator to try to resolve the issue and that there are many parties to deal with. Ms. Hess stated that they are close on settlement and that they would like to continue the trial date to March. Mr. Freedman stated that he does not object to the continuance and would stipulate to such. Mr. Koplowitz reported that they had a full day of mediation, that they made substantial progress and suggests that they have Judge Gallagher act as an arbitrator for the remaining issues or go forward to trial. The Court reminded counsel that any continuance for the trial would need to be done in Department 206. The petition for conversion of trust assets, etc., and the petition for instructions were continued to September 14, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Conversion Of Trust Assets, Accounting, Recovery Of Trust Assets, Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Continued To Aug-31-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together: PTR-14-297777 The Wing & Wai Leung Family Trust, PES-14-297919 Estate of Wing Kwong Leung and PES-14-297920 Estate of Wai Chu Leung.

Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with (Petitioner) Vivian Leung (case 297777 only) Gerard Launay for (Trustees) Philip & Augusting Leung (Case 297777 only) and the named executor in cases 297919 & 297920. Stephanie Hess (via court call) for Gregory Leung. Vivian Leung in Propria Persona for case 297919 & 297920.

Mr. Freedman reported that they have mediated with Judge Gallagher, that the parties are working on the terms of the settlement, that 4 out of 5 of the beneficiaries are in agreement, that if there is a settlement it will provide for an 850 petition being filed and if that is granted the estate matters can go off calendar, that the settlement will provide complete resolution globally, that the estate cases were not properly brought to the court, that they are defective and that it makes sense to take them off calendar as the petitions will need to be refiled. Mr. Launay stated that he agrees with Mr. Freedman, that they had filed certain allegations against Vivian that they plan to dismiss, that they would need an adjustment regarding the preliminary distribution, that in regards to Gregory Leung if the case does not settle they will file papers to protect the cash taken from the father to be accounted for and that $530,000.00 of that money has been transferred to Ms. Hess's trust account. Ms. Hess reported that she is in agreement with counsel, that the parties are working towards settlement and that she has no objection to taking the estate cases off calendar. Mr. Freedman stated that he would like to coordinate the status date with a possible hearing date for the approval of the settlement. The Court stated that it would like a backup plan in case the parties do not settle and confirmed that everyone was in agreement for taking the estate cases off calendar. The matter was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial on December 7, 2015, 9:30 a.m. (order for the same signed in open court and will be mailed to Ms. Hess). The Petition for Conversion of Trust Assets, etc., and the Petition for Instructions were continued to August 31, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation. The two estate cases (PES-14-297919 & PES-14-297920) were taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS

Petition For Conversion Of Trust Assets, Accounting, Recovery Of Trust Assets, Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Continued To Aug-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gerard Launay for Augustine Leung. Martin Triano for and with Vivian Leung Lerche. Stephanie Hess for Greg Leung (Respondent).

Mr. Triano and Ms. Hess are willing to consider mediation and agree that it would be helpful to exchange documents. Mr. Launay stated that he is not willing to do mediation, that he needs to know how much money Vivian and Greg have taken, that he is not sure if the monies belong to the Trust or whether it should be an Estate, that he would like to clean up his pleadings within two weeks and that he feels the money is unprotected. The Petition for Conversion of Trust Assets, etc. was continued to August 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 by which time the amended petition is to be on file and the Parties are to decide on mediation.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Stewart. (Not Reported)
